mapper.sql: id, service_id, tool_name, tool_description, input_schema_json, rest_endpoint, rest_method, rest_headers_json, rest_param_mapping_json, response_mapping_json, enabled, version_no, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_tool_mapping (service_id, tool_name, tool_description, input_schema_json, rest_endpoint, rest_method, rest_headers_json, rest_param_mapping_json, response_mapping_json, enabled) VALUES (#{serviceId}, #{toolName}, #{toolDescription}, #{inputSchemaJson}, #{restEndpoint}, #{restMethod}, #{restHeadersJson}, #{restParamMappingJson}, #{responseMappingJson}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_tool_mapping SET tool_name = #{toolName}, tool_description = #{toolDescription}, input_schema_json = #{inputSchemaJson}, rest_endpoint = #{restEndpoint}, rest_method = #{restMethod}, rest_headers_json = #{restHeadersJson}, rest_param_mapping_json = #{restParamMappingJson}, response_mapping_json = #{responseMappingJson}, enabled = #{enabled}, version_no = version_no + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version_no = #{versionNo} AND deleted = b'0'
UPDATE mcp_tool_mapping SET deleted = b'1' WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = b'0'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mcp_tool_mapping WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_tool_mapping WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND deleted = b'0' ORDER BY tool_name
SELECT FROM mcp_tool_mapping WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND tool_name = #{toolName} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_tool_mapping WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND enabled = b'1' AND deleted = b'0' ORDER BY tool_name
SELECT FROM mcp_tool_mapping WHERE enabled = b'1' AND deleted = b'0' ORDER BY service_id, tool_name
